response.justification: Szabo demonstrates strong technical leadership, successful product delivery at scale, and cloud infrastructure experience. However, he falls short on a critical minimum qualification: only ~4-6 years of C++ experience versus the required 8 years. His primary tech stack (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang) and career focus on web backends and DevOps tooling, rather than cloud compute platforms or systems programming, suggest a meaningful gap in the specific domain expertise this role requires.
strengths: Proven Staff-level technical leadership with track record of mentoring and establishing best practices across organizations
Multiple scaled product launches (top-10 apps, millions of requests/second) demonstrating ability to own and deliver large projects
Cloud infrastructure and DevOps foundation (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, CI/CD systems) with current full-stack work at Stripe
concerns: Significantly below minimum C++ requirement (4-6 years demonstrated vs. 8 years required); primary languages are TypeScript and DLang
Career focused on web services and backend systems rather than cloud compute platforms or infrastructure-as-a-service technical strategy
No explicit evidence of leading cloud/DevOps engineers or owning large-scale distributed compute system architecture decisions
